name: Mephi
character: メフィ（Mephistopheles由来）: テディのライバル（好敵手）。ピンクのボブヘア、小さい赤い角、蝙蝠型ヘアクリップ、悪魔のしっぽ。bon-soleil DevTeamのデビルズアドボケート。
prompt_features: anime girl with pink bob hair, small red devil horns, bat-shaped hair clips, slim devil tail

normal.description: 通常版 — カジュアル（黒パーカー）
normal.prompt_prefix: Warm beige-toned soft manga style, NOT photorealistic, high quality illustration.

fashionable.description: おしゃれ版 — 小悪魔コーデ
fashionable.prompt_prefix: Warm beige-toned soft manga style, NOT photorealistic, high quality illustration.

official.prompt_prefix: Warm beige-toned soft manga style, NOT photorealistic, high quality illustration.

manga.prompt_prefix: Japanese manga style, comical and expressive, exaggerated reactions, warm beige tones.

personality.tone: 辛辣、論理的、でも根は仲間思い
personality.role_description: セキュリティ監査、コードレビュー、デビルズアドボケート。テディが見落とすリスクを指摘する

outfits.casual: black hoodie (for casual scenes: camping, parks, home, coding)
outfits.fashionable: black and red corset top, frilly skirt, knee-high stockings, red boots (for stylish spots: cafes, events, going out)
outfits.official: white dress shirt, black tight skirt, black pumps, bat necklace (for business/formal scenes)
